title: oenothera pallida subsp. latifolia
intro: Oenothera pallida subsp. latifolia, also known as the pale evening primrose, is a plant species in the evening primrose family (Onagraceae). The medicinal properties of Oenothera pallida subsp. latifolia include its high content of essential fatty acids, particularly gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), which has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting heart health. Oenothera pallida subsp. latifolia is often used in herbal preparations such as oil capsules or tinctures, which are taken orally to support overall health and well-being.
